nasb.text: also half of Gilead, with Ashtaroth and Edrei, the cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, were for the sons of Machir the son of Manasseh, for half of the sons of Machir according to their families.

esv.text: and half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, the cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan. These were allotted to the people of Machir the son of Manasseh for the half of the people of Machir according to their clans.

cnv.text: 還有基列的一半和亞斯他錄、以得來，就是在巴珊，噩的王國的兩座城，都是按著家族分給瑪拿西的兒子瑪吉的孫子，就是分給瑪吉的一半孫子。

ccb.text: 还有基列的一半和巴珊王噩的两座城——亚斯她录和以得来。玛拿西的儿子玛吉的一半子孙按宗族分到这些土地。
